channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: My Unlikely Friendship with Bill Rusher
item.description: We deprive ourselves of true connection when we are unwilling to bond with people across the political aisle.

item.title: There Is No Shame in Getting Older
item.description: To deny old age is to deny what it means to have a vital society.

item.title: Boulder Climate Lawsuit Is a Tax on Every American
item.description: The Supreme Court should shut down a Colorado attempt to run roughshod over federal energy policy.

item.title: A Tale of Two Shows in Philly for America 250th
item.description: PAFA shines, thanks in part to a dazzling renovation, the PMA not so much.
